library.title: Maktabadda
library.subtitle: Codkaaga iyo mashruucyada gitaarka, laga bilaabo fikrad ilaa la sii daayo.

no_results.title: Wax mashruuc ah lama helin
no_results.description: Isku day inaad hagaajiso shaandhada goobidda ama heerka

empty.title: Maktabadaada waa madhan
empty.description: Mashruuc cusub ka bilow xoq, ama soo dejintu waxay ku qaadanaysaa aad hore ugu haysatey saxanka.

project_dialog.title: Mashruuc cusub
project_dialog.description: Sii magac oo dooro qaabka duubista.

album_dialog.title: Album cusub
album_dialog.description: Mashruucyada laxiriira kooxda oo noqda albamka.

album.empty: Weli ma jiraan wax mashruuc ah oo albamkan ku jira.
album.delete_confirm_description: Mashaariicda lama tirtiri doono, kaliya ayaa laga jaray "{{name}}".

delete_project.confirm_description: Tani waxay meesha ka saaraysaa mashruuca iyo wax kasta oo ku jira. Tan lama celin karo

record.title: Diiwaangeli
record.subtitle: Qaado qaadashada nadiif ah, fiirso heerarkaaga, oo raac qoraalka.

guide.title: Fadhi la hagayo
guide.subtitle: U oggolow tababaraha inuu ku dhex maro qoraalka tallaabo-tallaabo, laga bilaabo kululaynta ilaa weedha lagu hadlo.
guide.unavailable: Kalfadhiga la hagayay wali lagama heli karo serfarka
guide.select_project_device: Dooro mashruuc iyo qalab galinta si aad halkan uga duubto talaabooyinka saxda ah.
guide.complete_body: Waxaad duubtay tallaabo kasta oo qoraalka ah. Dib ugu noqo qaybta maqalka ee mashruuca oo dooro qaadashada aad jeceshahay.

best2min.button: Soo hel 2 daqiiqo ee ugu fiican (Suno)
best2min.hint: Wuxuu sameeyaa falanqayn tamar iyo caddayn guud ahaan qaadashada si uu u helo 2-daqiiqo daaqada ugu xoogan - wali waxaad ku hagaajin kartaa kala duwanaanta gacanta ka dib.
best2min.unavailable: Falanqaynta-2-daqiiqo ee ugu fiican weli lagama heli karo serfarkan.

record.takes_empty: Wali ma jiro wax la duubay oo fadhigan lagu sameeyay.
record.select_project_first: Dooro mashruuc si aad u bilowdo.

no_takes.title: Weli ma qaadanayso
no_takes.description: Qor qaado cusub ama soo daji fayl jira

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Codka ceeriin iyo nooc kasta oo la farsameeyay waa laga saarayaa.

pipeline.title: Silsilad farsamaynta
pipeline.preset_save: U keydi sidii hore loo diyaariyey
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Waxay u baahan tahay wax dheeraad ah oo aan la rakibin
pipeline.no_stages: Ma jiraan heerar la heli karo

export.title: Dhoofinta qaado
export.description: Ka soo saar faylka kama dambaysta ah nooca la habeeyey.

notes.placeholder: Qoraalada qaab bilaashka ah ee ku saabsan mashruucan…

lyrics.placeholder: Halkan ku qor ereyada Isticmaal palette-ka dhinaca si aad u geliso Suno meta-tags.
lyrics.versions_empty: Weli ma jiro noocyo la keydiyay.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Qoraalka hadda jira waxaa lagu beddeli doonaa nooca lagu keydiyay {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Guji calaamad si aad u geliso cursorka.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Aan la xaqiijin - waxaa laga yaabaa inaysan wax saameyn ah ku yeelan natiijada.

prompts.preview_empty: Dooro qaab-dhismeedka oo buuxi doorsoomayaasha si aad u aragto horudhac.
prompts.char_count_warning: Qaabka ayaa keenay in ka badan 1000 xaraf ayaa laga yaabaa in Suno googooyo.
prompts.saved_to_project: Si degdeg ah ayaa loo keydiyay mashruuca

stems.title: Codka iyo gitaarka
stems.empty: Qaadashadan weli lama kala saarin. Orod kala soocida si aad u maqasho codadka iyo gitaarka oo gooni ah.
stems.capability_missing: Kala soocida isha laguma rakibin serfarkan.
stems.unavailable: Kala soocida codka/gitaarka lagama heli karo serfarkan weli.

import.title: Soo dejinta
import.subtitle: Keen mashaariicda horey ugu jiray saxanka maktabadda.

step1.title: Hel gal gal
step1.description: Tilmaan galka xididka mashaariicdaada iyo raadadkaaga.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg lama helin - faylasha u baahan beddelaad waa la boodi doonaa.

step2.title: Dib u eeg walxaha
step2.description: Hubi magacyada, heerka, iyo waxa la soo dejin doono ka hor inta aanad xaqiijin.

step3.title: Soo dejinta
step3.description: Xaqiiji inaad nuqul ka sameysid faylasha oo abuurto mashaariicda.
step3.copy_originals: Ku koobbi faylasha asalka ah maktabadda
step3.done_description: Mashaariicda hoose waxa laga dhex abuuray maktabadaada.

templates.title: Qaababka
templates.subtitle: Qaababka degdega ah ee dib loo isticmaali karo iyo meta-tags ee Suno.

editor.template_hint: Calaamadee meesha doorsoome kastaa iska leeyahay iyada oo magaceeda lagu duudduubay laba laabladood oo laablaaban - tusaale ahaan, doorsoome lagu magacaabo "nooc" wuxuu noqdaa nooc ku duudduuban laba furin iyo laba xidhidh.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Qaab dhismeedka iyo qaabka tags Suno waxay aqoonsan tahay erayada gudaha.

tier_legend.1: Tier 1 - waa la duubay oo joogto ah

metatags.empty: Weli ma jiraan calaamado gaar ah

settings.title: Dejinta
settings.subtitle: Macluumaadka nidaamka, luqadda, iyo dookhyada caadiga ah.
settings.gpu_none: Wax bixiyeyaal GPU ah lama helin
settings.lufs_target_hint: Loo isticmaalo sida soo jeedinta bilowga ah marka dhoofintu qaadanayso. Dabeecadda Suno waxay fadhidaa agagaarka -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Hagaha duubista Suno
guide.subtitle: Sida loo qabto codka iyo gitaarka waxay qaadataa natiijada ugu fiican.
guide.intro: Suno waxay si fiican u qabataa tixraacyo nadiif ah oo aan mugdi ku jirin. Hagahan waxa uu daboolayaa diyaarinta, heerarka bartilmaameedka, iyo qoraalka duubista ee 3-5 daqiiqo.

prep.title: Diyaarinta
prep.body: Ku duub qol la daweeyay ama mid leh walxo jilicsan oo badan (daahyada, roogagga, dharka armaajo). Demi taageereyaasha iyo wax kasta oo ka xun. Diiri codkaaga 5 daqiiqo ka hor inta aanad duubin.

levels.title: Heerarka: -12 ilaa -6 dBFS
levels.body: Ujeedo meelaha ugu sarreeya ee u dhexeeya -12 iyo -6 dBFS ee mitirka. Ka hooseeya xadkaas, sawaxanka asalka ayaa noqda mid la dareemo; korkiisa, khatarta goynta ayaa kor u kacda. Isticmaal mitirka bogga Diiwaanka si aad u dejiso faa'iidadaada ka hor intaadan bilaabin.

distance.title: Fogaanta makarafoonka: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Ka joog 15 ilaa 30 cm makarafoonka. In ka dhow taas ayaa buunbuuninayaa saqafyada iyo saamaynta u dhowaanshaha; Meel fog waxa ay soo qaadanaysaa rebal iyo buuq badan.

script.title: Qoraalka duubista
script.vowels: Shaqaale joogta ah - a, e, i, o, u
script.dynamics: Dhaqdhaqaaqa: ku bilow jilicsan, ku dhamee cod dheer
script.spoken_phrase: Hal weedh oo lagu hadlo, si Suno uu u akhriyo codkaga codka

expectations.title: Maxaa Suno filayaa
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, qalalan (ma laha fal celin ama saameyn), 3 ilaa 5 daqiiqo oo tixraac ah. 2da daqiiqo ee ugu nadiifsan, uguna matalaysa waxay badanaa keenaan natiijooyinka ugu fiican.

suno_voice_full.name: Qoraal cod buuxa oo loogu talagalay Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 daqiiqo oo la hagayo: kululaynta, shaqal, miisaan, laba qaybood oo heeso ah, firfircooni, iyo weedh lagu hadlo.

step.warmup_inst: Ku dabci hamaansiga, bishimaha bishimaha (brrr), iyo humus jilicsan ilaa hal daqiiqo. Looma baahna in la duubo - waa inaad dejiso cunahaaga ka hor inta aanad heesin.
step.vowels_inst: Ku qabo shaqal kasta - a, e, i, o, u - 3 ilaa 4 ilbiriqsi goobtaada raaxada leh, oo leh mug joogto ah. Tani waxay ka caawinaysaa Suno inay qaadato timbre saafiga ah ee codkaaga.
step.scales_inst: Ku hees miisaan fudud kor ka dibna hoos, "la" ama "na". Looma baahna inay kaamil noqoto - yoolku waa in la khariideeyo tirada codkaaga.
step.section_inst: Ku hees 8 ilaa 16 baararka heesta, adiga oo ula jeedada dhabta ah ee aad rabto inaad gudbiso. Ka hormari caddaynta iyo joogitaanka ka sarreeya dhammaystirka farsamada.
step.section2_inst: Ku hees 8 ilaa 16 baararka - sida ugu fiican ee chorus ama qayb ka duwan tii hore. Kala duwanaansho badan ayaa ka caawisa moodelku inuu barto codkaaga.
step.dynamics_inst: Ku hees kelmad isku mid ah adigoo ku bilaabaya mid aad u jilicsan oo ku dhammaanaya si dheer, adoon cidhiidhin cunahaaga. Tani waxay tusinaysaa Suno kala duwanaanshaha firfircoonida codkaaga.
step.spoken_inst: Hadal — ha heesin — weedh gaaban oo dabiici ah, sidii adigoo sheekeysanaya. Tani waxay ka caawinaysaa Suno inay aqoonsato timbre dhabta ah ee codkaaga.

errors.network: Waa la gaadhi kari waayay seerfarka
errors.device_busy: Qalabka maqalka ayaa isticmaalaya barnaamij kale.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg lama rakibin - ku rakib si aad u beddesho faylkan.
errors.disk_full: Meel disk ah oo aan ku filnayn
errors.permission_denied: Ogolaanshaha loo diiday waddada la siiyay.
errors.process_failed: Ku guul daraystay in la habeeyo qaadashada
errors.record_failed: Ku guul daraystay inuu bilaabo duubista
